hero.name: Wichayut Laorod
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: Specializing in scalable web applications, microservices architecture, and cloud-native systems — focused on building production-ready engineering solutions.

expertise.title: What I Build
expertise.subtitle: End-to-end capability across the stack — from responsive UIs to distributed backend systems.

items.title: Full Stack Development
items.desc: Building complete web applications with modern frontend frameworks and robust backend services.

items.title: API Design
items.desc: Designing clean, scalable APIs following REST principles and gRPC for service-to-service communication.

items.title: Microservices Architecture
items.desc: Decomposing systems into independently deployable services with well-defined boundaries.

items.title: Database Design
items.desc: Modeling relational and document databases with a focus on performance and data integrity.

items.title: Cloud & DevOps
items.desc: Containerizing workloads, configuring CI/CD pipelines, and deploying to cloud environments.

sysExp.title: Real Systems, Real Scale
sysExp.desc: Hands-on experience building and integrating production systems across multiple companies — not just side projects.
bullets: Integrated with 20+ microservices via REST and gRPC across distributed healthcare and enterprise platforms
Built scalable internal tools: IT Helpdesk ticketing system, Welfare Management system, Complaint Management system
Designed API flows and handled data consistency across polyglot persistence (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis)
Worked in containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes for local dev and production
Contributed to CI/CD pipelines for automated testing, building, and deployment
Collaborated in Agile teams across full SDLC: requirements, design, development, testing, deployment
Developed role-based access control (RBAC) and multi-step approval workflows

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use across the stack.

workExp.title: Engineering Experience
workExp.subtitle: From collaborative projects to production-scale enterprise systems.

bullets: Developed and optimized front-end interfaces for a large-scale enterprise e-commerce ecosystem covering main-web, supplier-web, and admin portals using React.js and Next.js.
Worked within a microservices-based architecture with nearly 20 backend services, integrating via REST and gRPC to ensure consistent and reliable cross-service communication.
Leveraged Docker, Kubernetes, Argo CD, and AWS to support CI/CD workflows and maintain application performance and availability at scale.
Built an internal complaint management system using React.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL, taking full ownership of the front-end architecture and UI/UX design.
Delivered reusable components and optimized workflows to provide a seamless user experience across multiple departments.
Developed the front-end for a Health Information Exchange (HIE) system using Next.js, integrated with a NestJS backend and PostgreSQL database.
Optimized front-end performance and improved data handling workflows for better user experience in clinical environments.
Developed a responsive front-end web application using Next.js.
Delivered the project 100% on-time, meeting all client requirements.
Developed the front-end for an internal Helpdesk & ticket-management system using Angular, integrated with a Spring Boot backend.
Worked with MySQL for data modeling, ticket workflows, and validation to ensure accurate and reliable issue tracking across the platform.

education.title: Academic Background
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering

projects.title: System-Focused Work
projects.subtitle: Each project highlights the problem, architecture, and engineering decisions — not just the tech list.

items.name: Enterprise E-Commerce Ecosystem
items.problem: Large-scale e-commerce platform required a unified and performant front-end across three separate portals.
items.solution: Developed and optimized interfaces for main-web, supplier-web, and admin portal, integrated with nearly 20 microservices.
items.architecture: React.js / Next.js + REST & gRPC + Docker / Kubernetes / Argo CD / AWS
features: Front-end for main-web, supplier-web, and admin portal
Integration with ~20 backend services via REST and gRPC
Containerized deployment with Docker and Kubernetes
CI/CD pipeline managed with Argo CD and AWS
Performance optimization for production scale

items.name: Complaint Management System
items.problem: No structured process for receiving, tracking, and resolving complaints across departments.
items.solution: Centralized complaint platform with submission forms, status tracking, and a consistent UX across multiple departments.
items.architecture: React.js Frontend + Express.js REST API + PostgreSQL
features: Complaint submission and real-time status tracking
Reusable UI components across departments
Role-based access for agents and admins
Status workflow and assignment management
Full ownership of front-end architecture and UI/UX design

items.name: Health Information Exchange (HIE)
items.problem: Patient health data fragmented across hospital systems with no unified front-end access point.
items.solution: Built the front-end interface integrated with a NestJS backend to surface clinical data clearly and efficiently.
features: Unified patient health record interface
Seamless integration with NestJS REST API
Optimized data handling for clinical environments
Role-based data access by medical role
Front-end performance improvements for real-world clinical use

items.name: Helpdesk & Ticket Management
items.problem: Manual IT ticket handling caused long resolution times and no tracking across the platform.
items.solution: Built the front-end for a ticket management system using Angular, integrated with a Spring Boot backend.
items.architecture: Angular Frontend + Spring Boot Backend + MySQL
features: Ticket submission and status tracking UI
MySQL data modeling for ticket workflows
Validation to ensure accurate issue tracking
Integration with Spring Boot REST API
Role-based access for users and agents

items.name: E-Tax System
items.problem: Client needed a modern, responsive front-end for electronic tax invoice management.
items.solution: Delivered a fully responsive Next.js web application on-time, meeting all client requirements.
features: Responsive UI built with Next.js
Electronic tax invoice management interface
Delivered 100% on-time
All client requirements met

arch.title: How I Think About Systems
arch.subtitle: A typical full-stack flow from client to cloud — the mental model behind every project.

principles.title: Separation of Concerns
principles.desc: Each layer has a single responsibility. Presentation, business logic, and data access are cleanly separated.

principles.title: API-First Design
principles.desc: APIs are designed as contracts before implementation. OpenAPI specs defined upfront for frontend–backend alignment.

principles.title: Production Mindset
principles.desc: Every system is built with observability, error handling, and scalability in mind — not just to pass tests.

contact.headline: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and engineering collaborations. Feel free to reach out.

availability.note: Open to full-time, freelance, and contract opportunities.
